ocr.text: In the 3rd Quarter 2023 performance metrics for Link REIT's logistics expansion, total revenue reached $150M, reflecting a
15% year-over-year change, with a market share of 30% and an occupancy rate of 85%, primarily in the Asia-Pacific region's
major markets. The net operating income totaled $50M, representing a 10% increase, with a 25% market share and a 90%
occupancy rate in China. Total assets amounted to $1.2B, showing an 8% rise, with a 40% market share and a 75% occupancy
rate in Japan. Acquisitions totaled $200M, a 20% increase, with a 35% market share and a 95% occupancy rate in South Korea,
while new developments were valued at $100M with a 12% change and a 32% market share. The total properties are 50,
showing a 5% increase, with a 20% market share and an 85% occupancy rate in Singapore, while leasing activity covered 200K
sq.m., reflecting a 15% increase and a 30% market share. Occupancy rates reached 95% in Hong Kong, with tenant retention at
85%, a 5% change, and a 10% market share in Australia, accompanied by a future outlook of $300M. Operational efficiency in
Malaysia was at 75%, with a 7% increase and a 15% market share in Vietnam.

100%, with a 10% increase.

In the key financial ratios for Q32023, liquidity ratios included a current ratio of 1.5 and a quick ratio of 1.2, while leverage
ratios indicated a debt/equity ratio of 0.45 and total debt of ¥500M. Profitability ratios showed a cap rate of 4.2%, operating
margin at 6.5%, P/E ratio at 18.2, dividend yield of 10.5%, and return on equity at 5.3, with net income reported at ¥200M and
net asset value reflecting a year-over-year change of 0.15.
